name: openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG maintains 25 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for openEuler Intel Arch SIG. The SIG has 33 core members and maintains 25 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-intel-arch@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG maintains 25 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Intel-Arch.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Intel-Arch SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Jun Tian, Chenxi Mao, Jun Yang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
